title: taraxacum eurylobum
intro: Taraxacum eurylobum, also known as the Meadow Sow Thistle, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum eurylobum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support liver function. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum eurylobum are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used to treat various health conditions.
